props.name: imageAlt
props.description: Alt text for the image. Defaults to `name`.

props.name: collection
props.description: Collection name; rendered in muted text above the name.

props.name: collectionBadge
props.description: Optional collection badge shown as an overlay in the top-left of the image.

props.name: aspectRatio
props.description: Aspect ratio of the image; defaults to 1 (square).

props.name: price
props.description: Price label (e.g. "0.42 ETH"). Rendered in the footer.

props.name: priceSecondary
props.description: Secondary price label (e.g. "$1,234"). Rendered under `price` in muted text.

props.name: traits
props.description: Trait list. Rendered in a 2-column grid between the header and footer.

props.name: maxTraits
props.description: Cap on the number of traits shown before truncating with "+N more". Default: 4.
